title: austrobassia stelligera
intro: Austrobassia stelligera is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae, commonly known as the Stellate Bitter Apple or Devil's Apple. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Austrobassia stelligera include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Austrobassia stelligera is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
